title: Tender Jamaican Casserole Bites
description: A fusion twist on traditional Japanese cuisine, these bite-sized casserole treats combine the flavors of Jamaica with a Japanese flair.

ingredients.name: jamaican spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most grocery stores or online

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together tender, Jamaican spice blend, and soy sauce.
Add grape tomatoes and mix until well combined.
Using a small cookie scoop or spoon, form mixture into 1-inch balls.
Place balls onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until tender and lightly browned.
